info.title: GitBucket API
info.description:
GitBucket implements the GitHub API v3. This OpenAPI specification documents the API for GitBucket 4.42.1.

GitBucket is a Git web platform powered by Scala offering features similar to GitHub with GitHub API compatibility.

host.description: Your GitBucket server hostname and port

token.description: Personal access token or OAuth token (Authorization: token YOUR_TOKEN)

basicAuth.description: Basic authentication with username and password

pull_request.description: Present if issue is a pull request

get.description: Returns API metadata
Returns the currently authenticated user
List all users
Get details of a specific user
List public repositories for the specified user
List repositories for the authenticated user

post.summary: Create a repository for authenticated user

get.description: List repositories for the specified organization

post.description: Create a new repository in the specified organization

get.description: Get repository details
List issues for a repository

post.description: Create a new issue in a repository

get.description: Get details for a specific issue
List pull requests for a repository
Get details for a specific pull request
List branches for a repository
List releases for a repository
Get contents of a file or directory
Get a Git reference (branch, tag, or commit)
List all labels for a repository
List milestones for a repository
List webhooks for a repository

post.description: Create a new user account (admin only)

get.description: Non-GitHub compatible API - List all installed plugins
